description: Reported Rock 1 (Revenue Visibility) and Rock 2 (One Texas Cadence) as 'Not Started' in the morning briefing. Read status directly from the quarterly-objectives.md file without cross-referencing actual activity. Revenue is actively tracked in the One Texas Scorecard and comp-tracker. One Texas Sales Update is scheduled for next Thursday (Apr 30) and a follow-up task was created Apr 22.
correction: Both rocks are In Progress. Rock 1: revenue visible in One Texas Scorecard and comp-tracker. Rock 2: One Texas Sales Update Apr 30, email follow-up task created Apr 22. File updated.
systemic_fix: At boot, do not read rock status from file and report verbatim. Cross-reference against live calendar, recent tasks, and known activity before surfacing status. If file is stale, update it — don't report it.
